title: Urgent correction (no, I said Tuesday)

transcript.agent: Perfect, I am booking the pickup for Thursday at nine in the morning and sending...
transcript.caller: no, I said Tuesday, not Thursday

why_it_matters: A correction is the most costly place to be slow. Every extra word the agent speaks over the caller is a word committing to the wrong action. This scenario uses a tighter yield window than a normal interruption on purpose.
